verses.text: Egypt gamah huhna ngen dingin paisuk a, sakol suan'in nei-in leengte a tam manin muang a, sakol tung tuangte a hat mahmah manin muang napi-in Israel-te' Siangtho Pa a suanglo, Topa thu a dong lote in gimna ngah ta hen
Ahih hangin amah pilin gimna tungsak a, thu a gensate dokkik loin, siatna a bawl mite leh mawhna nasep a seppihte gim a pia hi
Egypt mite mihing hi a, Pasian hilo hi. Amau' sakolte sa hi a, kha hilo hi. Topa in a khut a zan ciangin a huhpa pukin, huhna a ngahpa tuk ding a, amaute khempeuh siakhawm ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in keima tungah hih bangin hong ci hi: Humpinelkai ahi a, humpinelkai khanglai a hat mahmah in ahi zongin a sa nek ding a ngik ciangin tua humpi a do dingin tuucing honpi khat kikaikhawmin, amaute' otna hangin lau tuan hetloin, amaute' gamlumna hangin a sin a dawi tuanloh mah bangin Vanglian Topa zong Zion Mual tungah galdo dingin kuansuk ding hi
A bu a hongin a kot lamlam vasate bangin Vanglian Topa in Jerusalem dal ding hi. Amah in dalin khahkhia ding a, amah susia loin suaktasak ding hi
Israel mite aw, nakpi takin na dopa uh' lamah kihei kik un
Bang hang hiam cih leh a kuamah peuh in no-a' dingin na bawlsa uh, mawhna ahi na ngun milimte uh na paihkhiat hun uh hong tung ding hi

“Assiria pen mihing' namsau a hilo, namsau khat tawh puk ding a, mihing' namsau a hilo, namsau khat in susia ding hi. Namsau panin tai ding uh a, a tangvalte uh zawhthawh thu tawh nasem dingin kikoih ding hi
Amau' belh a kumpipa uh a launa hangin tai ding a, buaina hangin a uliante in a dialkhai uh taisan ding uh hi,” ama meikuang Zion-ah a om, ama meikhuk Jerusalem khua-ah a om Topa in ci hi.
